video_title: Lawfare Daily: The Jan. 6 Pardonee Crime Wave with Katherine Pompilio
gist: Lawfare editors Benjamin Wittes and Katherine Pompilio discuss Pompilio's investigation documenting 97 cases of January 6 clemency recipients committing unrelated crimes (violent, sex, gun, DUI/drug) since the riot — 2.5x prior CREW/NYT counts. The episode is entirely about criminal-justice and political-accountability journalism; it contains essentially no market-relevant or investor-actionable signal.
